initiatives.name: Lexington Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization coordinating mutual aid and community support initiatives in Lexington. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building community power through collective action and neighborhood organizing.

initiatives.name: Peacecraft
initiatives.description: A fair trade store fostering mutual aid and community power through ethical commerce and cultural exchange in Berea. They coordinate artisan support, sustainable trade, and solidarity networks while building power through global partnerships, economic justice, and creating spaces for cultural connection and community education.

initiatives.name: Lexington Tool Library
initiatives.description: A community-owned and controlled, pay-what-you-can library of things for making our homes and communities better.
